title: Boatman
description:
Job Description & Requirement

We are seeking a skilled and dedicated Boat Skipper/Assistant to support environmental survey operations aboard our vessel. This role involves assisting in vessel operations, navigation, maintenance, and supporting scientific teams in conducting environmental study and data collection

Key Responsibilities

· Operate and assist in navigating the survey boat in compliance with maritime regulations and safety protocols.

· Support environmental survey teams in collecting environmental data, samples as well as deploying and retrieving research equipment.

· Conduct routine maintenance checks on the vessel, ensuring all safety and operational equipment is in good working order.

· Assist with logistic planning, including fuel management and site assessments.

· Ensure adherence to environmental and marine conservation guidelines during operations.

· Record and maintain logs of vessel operations, weather conditions, and any incidents.

· Communicate effectively with the survey team and shore-based personnel.

· Assist in emergency procedures and respond effectively to unexpected situations on the water.


Qualifications and basic skills

· Valid boating license or skipper certification (e.g. Steersman/helmsman license)

· Experience operating small to mid-sized vessels, preferably in a survey, research, or marine environment.

· Knowledge of maritime safety regulations, navigation techniques, and emergency response protocols.

· Basic mechanical knowledge for minor vessel maintenance and troubleshooting.

· Experience working in environmental research, marine biology, or oceanography (preferred but not required).

· Strong teamwork, communication, and problem-solving skills.

· Physical fitness and the ability to work in challenging marine conditions.

· Proficient swimming skills for field surveys around water environments.


Desirable Skills

· Familiarity with hydrographic or environmental survey equipment.

· First Aid and Sea Survival Certification.

· Experience working with marine survey companies

postedCompany.description: DHI is a global and independent research and development organisation dedicated to work within the fields of water, environment and health. Within these fields we provide a wide range of consulting, research and policy services as well as leading edge technologies and products. A good working environment where everyone contributes to the common goal is at the top of the agenda.
postedCompany.name: DHI WATER & ENVIRONMENT (S) PTE. LTD.
